title: Eggless custom cakes with Rasmalai, Mango, and 13 other flavours — Harris Park
summary:
Most custom cake searches near Granville or Westmead turn up the same two options: generic, or not eggless.

Harris Park has been the third option since 2019. Fifteen flavours — including Rasmalai, Mango, and Ferrero Rocher — baked entirely without eggs. Not some cakes. Every cake, every time.

Six sizes from 6-inch to 16-inch. Any design — photo references welcome. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. 48-hour minimum notice. Pickup from Wigram Street.

Open daily until 10pm, which is why picking up after work is an option most people don't expect.
keywords: Rasmalai Mango eggless cake Harris Park
no eggs custom cake near Parramatta
